headline: Live Nation Antitrust Trial Highlights Ticketmaster Dependence, $386 Million Venue Profit
summary: Testimony suggests artists struggled to avoid Ticketmaster-linked venues, while Live Nation amphitheaters generated $386 million in 2024 profit.
